subcodes.first_line: O accomplished sage! Shiraz was once the gathering place of mystics and the source of humility and supplication. Blessed souls arose from that land [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فاضل کامل شیراز مجمع اهل راز بود و مصدر عجز و نیاز نفوس مبارکی از آن کشور
subcodes.subjects: @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
